stories.headline: PPL's 'advanced' PA data center pipeline jumps 12% to 28.3 GW by 2034
stories.summary: PPL's advanced-stage Pennsylvania data center pipeline grew to 28.3 GW from 25.2 GW three months ago, with 10 GW under signed agreements and 5 GW under construction for QTS, AWS, PowerHouse and CoreWeave; CEO Vincent Sorgi warned PJM's reliability backstop auction may not adequately shift costs to large loads, while PPL-Blackstone is 'executing multiple gas turbine reservation agreements' in the queue. Western Hub printed $16.14/MWh and load hit 84,038 MW in this morning's PJM snapshot.

stories.headline: Vistra adds 4.5 GW across PJM, ERCOT, ISO-NE; sees 2-3% PJM load growth through 2030
stories.summary: Vistra has 4.5 GW of capacity additions completed or in process — gas uprates, coal-to-gas conversions, renewables and nuclear uprates — and CEO Jim Burke told Q1 investors that 2–3% annual PJM load growth and 5–6% in ERCOT is 'reasonable' through 2030, on top of the pending $4B Cogentrix acquisition.

stories.headline: WTI crude jumps 3.5% to $101/bbl as Iran ceasefire on 'massive life support'
stories.summary: WTI crude rose $3.39 to $101.46/bbl Tuesday morning after Trump said Monday the Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support,' raising Strait of Hormuz shipping fears; the national gasoline average sits at $4.50/gal, driving Trump and Sen. Hawley to push a federal gas tax holiday.

stories.headline: SCOTUS 6-3 clears Alabama's old map; South Carolina moves to redraw Clyburn's seat today
stories.summary: The Supreme Court Monday vacated the 2023 injunction requiring two Black-majority Alabama districts, letting GOP officials revert to a map that erases Rep. Shomari Figures's 2nd District (+1 GOP); South Carolina House Republicans take up bills today to redraw Rep. Jim Clyburn's 6th District and push primaries to August 11.

stories.headline: Trump backs federal gas tax holiday as $4.50/gal hits GOP; Boyle bill already filed
stories.summary: Trump Monday called a federal gas tax holiday 'a great idea' as the national average sits at $4.50/gal post-Iran war, but Senate Majority Leader Thune sounded skeptical Democrats would go along; Rep. Brendan Boyle (D-PA) filed a similar bill last month capping the 18-cent tax when gas exceeds $4.

stories.headline: Senate votes on Warsh Fed Board confirmation today, procedural step on chair role
stories.summary: The Senate votes today to confirm Kevin Warsh to the Federal Reserve Board of Governors and takes an initial procedural vote on his elevation to Fed chair, with the final chair confirmation vote expected Wednesday.

stories.headline: Trump nominates Sen. Doug Mastriano as U.S. ambassador to Slovakia
stories.summary: Trump Monday nominated state Sen. Doug Mastriano (R-Adams) — the 2022 GOP gubernatorial nominee who lost to Shapiro 56.5-41.7 — to be U.S. ambassador to Slovakia; confirmation by the Senate Foreign Relations Committee would vacate his SD-33 seat in conservative south-central PA and trigger a special election.

stories.headline: PA Supreme Court Justice David Wecht switches affiliation from Democrat to Independent
stories.summary: Justice David Wecht announced Monday he is changing his voter registration from Democrat to Independent, saying his 'jurisprudence and adjudication have always been independent, and they always will be'; voters retained Wecht to a second 10-year term last November.

stories.headline: Mystery super PAC drops $556K in PA-07 Democratic primary days before vote
stories.summary: TV spots and mailers from a mysterious super PAC are flooding the closing days of the PA-07 Democratic primary — one of the country's most-watched House races — where four Democrats compete to challenge GOP Rep. Ryan Mackenzie in November in the Lehigh Valley swing district.

stories.headline: Giants walk off Pirates 7-6 in 12 innings to take series; Pittsburgh falls to 22-19
stories.summary: Jesús Rodríguez's bases-loaded single in the bottom of the 12th lifted San Francisco past the Pirates 7-6 Sunday at Oracle Park after the Bucs blew a pair of two-run leads, dropping them to 22-19 and fourth in the NL Central; they had Monday off and open a homestand against Colorado tonight at PNC.

stories.headline: Penguins enter offseason with NHL's most cap space and a Malkin decision looming
stories.summary: Kyle Dubas projects to enter free agency July 1 with roughly $40M in cap space — the most in the NHL — while weighing whether to re-sign 38-year-old Evgeni Malkin, who has said he wants to return for 2026-27; Crosby and Letang remain under contract.

stories.headline: Aaron Rodgers visits Pittsburgh over weekend, but no Steelers meeting; OTAs open May 18
stories.summary: Aaron Rodgers traveled to Pittsburgh over the weekend but did not meet with the Steelers and no deal was reached, per reports; the team wrapped rookie minicamp Sunday under head coach Mike McCarthy, with the first day of organized team activities set for May 18.
